claimText: Sea Buckthorn seeds grown in Ladakh are part of experiments on board the International Space Station.
evidenceExcerpt: Its seeds grown in Ladakh are part of experiments on board the International Space Station flown by NASA’s Crew-11 mission.
examUse: Statement-based question on recent scientific experiments involving Indian flora.

claimText: Sea Buckthorn is a deciduous shrub or tree that is well-adapted to cold, high-altitude environments.
evidenceExcerpt: Deciduous shrub/tree; Well-adapted to live in cold areas of high altitude.
examUse: Species identification or habitat matching question.

claimText: Sea Buckthorn acts as a pioneer species that aids in soil improvement, wind and sand control, and soil and water conservation.
evidenceExcerpt: Pioneer species for soil improvement, wind & sand control, and soil & water conservation
examUse: Statement-based question on the ecological roles and conservation utility of specific plant species.
